transportedTraceSpace.name: X_aug
transportedTraceSpace.definition: closure Ran(R_aug) with quotient norm inf{||f||_V:R_aug f=x}

statement: The finite trace quotient norms induced by R_aug,N converge to the transported quotient norm on X_aug in the Mosco sense.

quotientLimsupInputStatus.label: trace quotient limsup input
quotientLimsupInputStatus.reason: Recovery sequences provide the upper bound for quotient norm convergence.

quotientLiminfInputStatus.label: trace quotient liminf input
quotientLiminfInputStatus.reason: Weak compactness and lower semicontinuity provide the lower bound for quotient norm convergence.

traceQuotientCompatibilityStatus.label: trace quotient compatibility
traceQuotientCompatibilityStatus.reason: The quotient limsup and liminf inequalities identify the finite transported trace quotient norms with the limiting quotient norm on X_aug.

proof: Use the quotient limsup theorem for the upper semicontinuity inequality.
Use the quotient liminf theorem for the lower semicontinuity inequality.
Conclude convergence of finite trace quotient spaces to X_aug.
